statement: The version control component launches the full Builder via route navigation (/builder/:id) through a prominent branded launch component (more than a button); no builder visual or src/builder/** import on the Version page (core.md §13, D-5 Option B).

provenance.source: HV-2 sprint execution — proposed and applied 2026-06-30

trace.decision: D-5 — Option B: no builder visual; branded launch component; Option A (live preview) deferred
